variants.title: WP520
variants.option1Value: Filtrec B251C10 Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WP520
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec B251C10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the B251C10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 85.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 53.0 mm, Length: 58.0 mm, Seal Material: Polyurethane, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Seal: Polyurethane

variants.title: WP520
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 8005 Air Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WP520
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 84.0 mm, Dimension B: 55.0 mm, Dimension C: 55.0 mm, Dimension H: 60.5 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 85.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 53.0 mm, Length: 58.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Seal: Polyurethane, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C
